prompt: Hey can you review this PR diff for me? We're adding a new user login endpoint to our Flask API. [Flask auth PR with SQL injection, MD5 hashing, no input validation]

assertions.text: Review identifies SQL injection vulnerability in the login or register endpoint
Review flags MD5 as insecure for password storage and suggests bcrypt/argon2/scrypt
Security issues are marked as error severity (not just warnings or info)
Overall verdict is REQUEST CHANGES given error-severity security issues
Review includes a structured summary with category breakdown (table or list)
